message:
fix(command,runtime): fix BITFIELD i64 overflow handling, harden Lua string.rep/format, add multi-db persistence tests

BITFIELD INCRBY: use overflowing_add to detect i64 wraparound and
propagate the overflow flag through bitfield_clamp_with_overflow so
SAT/WRAP/FAIL modes behave correctly when the intermediate sum exceeds
i64 range (both signed and unsigned encodings).

Lua: guard string.rep against negative counts and cap output at 512 MB
to prevent OOM; apply the same 512 MB cap to lua_fmt_pad width; add a
test proving the empty `while true do end` loop hits the iteration
limit.

Runtime: remove leftover WATCH debug println; add round-trip tests for
MOVE + SWAPDB state across AOF save/load, RDB snapshot/restore, and
BGREWRITEAOF rewrite paths (multi-database correctness).

Conformance: add CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT/COUNTKEYSINSLOT to HELP
fixture; add stateful SWAPDB end-to-end fixture (core_connection);
add stateful MOVE end-to-end fixture (core_server); add MOVE+SWAPDB
AOF replay fixtures for db0 and db2 views (persist_replay).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3134,6 +3134,8 @@ mod tests {
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER INFO".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER MYID".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER KEYSLOT <key>".to_vec())),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT <slot> <count>".to_vec())),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER COUNTKEYSINSLOT <slot>".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER SLOTS".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER SHARDS".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CLUSTER NODES".to_vec())),
